items.title: Helm
items.summary: Is used in a Kubernetes environment to bundle and configure the microservices for deployments. A package is known as a chart. A chart contains templates, default values for the templates and optional dependencies. Each component that needs to be deployed will have its own chart describing how to deploy it. Library charts named common are used to reduce the boilerplate definitions from the component charts. A library chart doesn't contain any deployable definitions but only reusable templates. To deploy all components into different types of environments the concept of parent charts and subcharts will be used. Each environment will be implemented as a parent chart that depends on different sets of subcharts. Helm charts can be published to a helm chart repository.

items.title: MergeSort
items.summary: It uses two temporary arrays leftArray and rightArray to hold the data, then combines them by comparing the elements.

headings.text: Description: Split the array into two halves and recursively sort them. Then merge the two sorted halves.
Time Complexity: O(nlogn) in all cases
Recommended use: When you need a stable sort and have a large dataset.
